name: Crab and Cream Cheese Hors D'oeuvre
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together all ingredients except almonds.
2. Mix in the salt and pepper to taste.
3. Pour the mixture into a shallow baking dish.
4. Sprinkle the slivered almonds over the top of the mixture.
5. Bake at 350 degrees until slightly browned on top.
6. Serve hot on crackers.
Makes 2 cups.
